news-global-econ.title: FCC Bans Foreign-Made Consumer Routers Citing 'Unacceptable Risk' of China Hacking
news-global-econ.description: The FCC has prohibited the import of consumer routers manufactured outside the United States, effectively blocking the majority of networking devices from entering the American market. The danger of Chinese hackers to everyday Americans has caused the governm…

news-global-econ.title: Spring break crackdown cuts arrests in hot spot while chaos spreads to other party hubs
news-global-econ.description: Miami Beach reports a 24% drop in spring break arrests in 2026, says Commissioner Alex Fernandez, while Daytona Beach and Fort Lauderdale continue battling seasonal chaos.

news-global-econ.title: Machado tells US oil giants Venezuela will become beacon of wealth creation after Trump ousted Maduro
news-global-econ.description: María Corina Machado is pitching Venezuela as a top U.S. oil partner after she said the Trump administration’s arrest of former dictator Nicolás Maduro opened up a “new era."

news-global-econ.title: Your internet router could be China-linked: FCC cracks down on ‘unacceptable’ security risks
news-global-econ.description: The FCC is moving to block new foreign-made internet routers from U.S. markets, warning that overseas supply chains pose serious national security risks.

news-global-econ.title: Soros-backed DA Krasner threatens ICE agents at Philly airport: ‘I will put you in handcuffs’
news-global-econ.description: Philadelphia DA Lawrence Krasner threatens to arrest ICE agents at airports, warning Trump officials: 'I will put you in handcuffs' if laws are broken.

news-global-soc.title: Iran-linked influence campaign pushes anti-Israel messaging disguised as US voices
news-global-soc.description: Foreign accounts allegedly mimic American voices online, with Argyle research claiming 60% of Operation Epic Fury discourse originates outside the U.S.
